text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian wins the Japan Cup and, in the midst
of thunderous applause, she and Hishi Amazon
vow to continue racing each other forever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The following day, Narita Brian goes to visit Biwa
Hayahide at the hospital. When she arrives,
however, her sister is nowhere to be seen...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide's injury has healed and she's back
to training with all her might. The two sisters
swear to battle at the Arima Kinen.
